question: In WebFlow, how do you add a Files section to your webpage?
answer: Click the 'Add Section' button in the center of the page, then select the 'Files' option from the left sidebar.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add Section' button located in the center of the page.
From the left sidebar, the 'Files' section option is selected by a mouse click.

question: In WebFlow, how do you set the header title of a Files section to 'Files'?
answer: Click the 'Edit' tab within the Files section and enter 'Files' in the 'Header Title' field.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Edit' tab within the newly added Files section.
In the 'Header Title' field, the text 'Files' is entered.

question: In WebFlow, how do you name the first file item 'Video' in a Files section?
answer: Click on the 'Item Name' field under the first file placeholder and type 'Video'.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Item Name' field under the first file placeholder.
The text 'Video' is typed into the 'Item Name' field.

question: In WebFlow, how do you configure a download button to link to 'www.example.com'?
answer: In the dialog box, click the 'Web Address' radio button, type 'www.example.com' into the input field, and click 'Done'.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Web Address' radio button within the dialog box.
The user types 'www.example.com' into the web address input field.
The user clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the web address entry.
